category_scores.rationale: Good coverage but missing some error cases
Test hints provided for most requirements
Could use more edge case hints

categories.rationale: Requirements are specific and testable. Each requirement clearly describes what the system must do without prescribing implementation details. MRD traceability is present.
Good use of Given-When-Then format. Happy paths well covered. Some error cases missing for FR-003 (what happens if invalidation fails?).
Test hints provided for most requirements. Could add more security-focused tests (cache poisoning, unauthorized access to cached data).
External dependencies clearly documented with versions and status. Owners identified.
FR-003 correctly flagged as medium uncertainty with discovery prompt. Other requirements appropriately marked as low uncertainty.
Clear exclusions prevent scope creep. Distributed caching and compression explicitly excluded.

findings.title: Missing error handling for cache invalidation failure
findings.description: FR-003 does not specify what happens if cache invalidation fails (e.g., network partition, timeout). Should stale data be served or should query fail?
findings.suggestion: Add acceptance criterion: Given cache invalidation fails, When user runs query, Then [define behavior - serve stale with warning OR fail with error]

findings.title: Missing security test hints
findings.description: No test hints for security scenarios: cache poisoning, unauthorized access to cached results, cache timing attacks.
findings.suggestion: Add test hints: {"type": "security", "focus": "Cached results not accessible across user sessions"}

findings.title: Cache size limit behavior unspecified
findings.description: NFR-002 specifies 100K cached queries capacity, but no acceptance criteria for what happens when limit is reached.
findings.suggestion: Add criteria specifying eviction policy (LRU recommended)

findings.title: Consider cache warmup requirement
findings.description: Out of scope lists 'cache warming on startup' but analysts may experience slow queries after restart. Consider adding as future enhancement.
findings.suggestion: Document as future consideration in MRD backlog

strengths: Clear, testable functional requirements with MRD traceability
Good use of Given-When-Then acceptance criteria format
Dependencies well documented with versions and status
Uncertainty properly flagged with discovery prompts
weaknesses: Some error handling scenarios not fully specified
Security test coverage could be improved

decision.rationale: Overall score of 7.8 exceeds minimum threshold. No critical or high severity findings. Two medium findings require attention but do not block development.
conditions: Address F-001: Define cache invalidation failure behavior
Address F-002: Add security test hints
decision.human_review_reason: Medium severity findings exist that require explicit acknowledgment
